title: Fulton Financial Corporation Declares Common and Preferred Dividends
author: Prnewswire
description: Fulton Financial Corporation announced a quarterly cash dividend of $0.19 per share on its common stock, payable July 15, 2026, to shareholders of record as of July 1, 2026. The company also declared a quarterly dividend of $12.81 per share on its Fixed Rate Non-Cumulative Perpetual Preferred Stock, Series A, for the same payment date.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The declaration of both common and preferred dividends demonstrates the company's financial strength and commitment to returning capital to shareholders. Regular dividend payments are a positive signal of stable earnings and management confidence in future cash flows.

title: Fulton Financial Corporation Declares Common and Preferred Dividends
author: Prnewswire
description: Fulton Financial Corporation announced its Board declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.19 per share on common stock, payable April 15, 2026, to shareholders of record as of April 1, 2026. Additionally, the company declared a quarterly dividend of $12.81 per share on its Fixed Rate Non-Cumulative Perpetual Preferred Stock, Series A, for the same payment date.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The company's declaration of both common and preferred dividends demonstrates financial strength and commitment to returning capital to shareholders. Regular dividend payments indicate stable earnings and confidence in future cash flows, which is typically viewed favorably by investors seeking income-generating investments.

title: Blue Foundry Bancorp To Merge With Fulton Financial In $243 Million Deal
author: Lekha Gupta
description: Blue Foundry Bancorp will be acquired by Fulton Financial in an all-stock deal valued at $243 million, with each Blue Foundry share exchanged for 0.6500 Fulton shares. The merger is expected to close in Q2 2026 and strengthen Fulton's presence in the northern New Jersey market.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Stock price surged 39.33% due to merger announcement and premium valuation of $11.67 per share
Expanding market presence, expected earnings boost over 5%, and strategic growth in local markets
Expanding market presence, expected earnings boost over 5%, and strategic growth in local markets

title: Fulton Financial Corporation and Blue Foundry Bancorp Combining in All-Stock Merger
author: Globe Newswire
description: Fulton Financial Corporation will acquire Blue Foundry Bancorp in an all-stock transaction valued at $243 million, expanding Fulton's presence in northern New Jersey and expected to be accretive to earnings.

title: Fulton Financial Corporation Declares Common and Preferred Dividends
author: Prnewswire
description: Fulton Financial Corporation announced quarterly cash dividends for its common stock ($0.18 per share) and Preferred Stock Series A ($12.81 per share), both payable on October 15, 2025.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Company declared consistent dividend payments, indicating financial stability and commitment to shareholders. The bank is a substantial financial institution with over $30 billion in assets and 200+ financial centers across multiple states.
